examples: He regularly uses odd rhythmic groupings and his melodies often employ the Lydian mode.
The Phrygian mode, as well as the Lydian (and the theoretical Lochrian), are very rarely encountered.
Scholarly support includes important editorial punctuation marks, as well as the Carian, Lycian, and Lydian scripts, and the Phaistos disc symbols.
Instead, several pieces are based on the Lydian scale (play it on your white piano keys from F to F).
It's a major-key sound, but unlike our major keys, which have a half step between the third and fourth tones, the Lydian scale has a whole step there, and the half step between steps four and five.
